description: Canadian organized crime group founded in 2010 in the Lower Mainland of British Columbia by Hells Angels member Larry Amero and others. It is a loosely allied, multi-ethnic consortium of mostly Millennial-aged gangsters that unites several organized crime groups. The group distributes cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel and operates across Canada, including British Columbia, Ontario, and Quebec. It is still active.

country_links.evidence_quote: Lavoie escaped to Colombia on a forged Bahamian passport. In Colombia, Lavoie joined forces with a Canadian mixed martial arts fighter and gangster, Steven Skinner, in a drug smuggling ring.
country_links.context: Lavoie escaped to Colombia and joined a drug smuggling ring there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Caputo fled Canada to Germany, where he was arrested in Cologne on 16 February 2013...
country_links.context: Caputo fled to Germany and was arrested in Cologne.

country_links.evidence_quote: Alkhalil fled to Greece, and was arrested in Athens on 23 February 2013...
country_links.context: Alkhalil fled to Greece and was arrested in Athens.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack worked as distributors of cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel of Mexico... Nabil Alkhalil served as the liaison with the Sinaloa Cartel.
country_links.context: The Wolfpack Alliance sourced cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel in Mexico and had a member, Nabil Alkhalil, settle there as a liaison.

country_links.evidence_quote: The meeting discussed plans to import cocaine from Mexico and Peru.
country_links.context: The Wolfpack planned to import cocaine from Peru.

country_links.evidence_quote: In January 2014, Riarch was arrested in the Philippines on charges of smuggling drugs into the Philippines from Mexico.
country_links.context: Riarch was arrested in the Philippines on drug smuggling charges.

country_links.evidence_quote: Do they have british airways[?] We get 4000 pds [pounds] in uk [United Kingdom] per
country_links.context: The Wolfpack planned to smuggle cocaine into the United Kingdom for higher profits.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Montreal wing of the Wolfpack operated a smuggling ring, bringing cocaine via secret compartments in trucks into and from the United States.
country_links.context: The Wolfpack smuggled cocaine via secret compartments in trucks into and from the United States, aiming to enter the New York drug market.
